chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-979 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 04-03-2025 Mr. Saif Rehman, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Imdad Ali Malik, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zameer Ahmed Ghanghro, Advocate for respondent No.5. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G a/w ASP Irfan, Focal Person on behalf of IG Prison Sindh, Karachi. Kamran Ahmed (respondent No.4) is present in person. **** Respondents No.2&4 file comments, taken on record. Respondent No.4 present in person submits that he is not on the post under challenge; therefore, this petition is not maintainable and is liable to be dismissed. Since brief has been held on behalf of the petitioners’ counsel; however, looking to the circumstances where posting of the respondent No.4 was challenged and he is not on the same post, therefore, this petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
